task: Describe what to implement here, or pass --task / set task_file.
_author_cmd_help: LLM A for the auto-fix E-gate; use a DIFFERENT model than the reviewer. No {prompt*} placeholder => the prompt is piped on stdin (robust). Or use {prompt_file}/{prompt_instruction} for a file-reading CLI.
pr_context: One paragraph describing what the change does and what the reviewer should focus on.
_auto_fix_help: Self-repair a CRITICAL/WARNING instead of escalating when the 5 gates pass. Defaults ON when author_cmd is set (the E-gate needs a separate author LLM), OFF otherwise. Explicit true/false overrides.
